rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 242, 255), rgb(23, 30, 41)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 125px; height: 1px; padding-top: 26px; margin-left: 14px;
